title: Undead Labs Reportedly Won't Be Required to Bring State of Decay 3 to Xbox Game Pass After Microsoft Sale
description: As Undead Labs continues development on State of Decay 3 under new ownership, it sounds like the zombie survival sequel won't be required to be on Xbox Game Pass.

title: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered’s Physical Switch 2 Release Comes on a Cartridge – Here’s Where You Can Preorder It
description: Preorders are live for The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered Physical Deluxe Edition on Nintendo Switch 2, which comes with the full base game on a cartridge. Here's where you can still grab a copy ahead of its August 11 release date.

title: Nintendo Switch Consoles Will No Longer Be Sold From Mid-February 2027 Onwards — at Least in Europe
description: After almost a decade on sale, Nintendo will no longer sell its original Switch console — including Switch Lite and Switch OLED models — from mid-February 2027 onwards in Europe.

title: The LEGO Marvel Dancing Groot Set Is Retiring Soon, but Amazon Has It on Sale for $36 Right Now
description: The LEGO Marvel Dancing Groot set is on sale for $35.99 at Amazon, 20% off its list price of $44.99. It's set to be retiring soon, so now is a great time to grab it.
